item.title: GLM-5.2 - How to Run Locally | Unsloth Documentation
item.description: Run the new GLM-5.2 model by Z.ai on local hardware!

item.title: Jobs and Software is Fucked
item.description: Or how I decided to scream into the void about how awful the job market is. I'm still in a very sour mood after the latest rounds of interviews but ultimatel...

item.title: Flock-Powered Police Chiefs Stalking Women Shows Why Warrants Are Needed (Public Report)
item.description: Documented LPR misuse by police chiefs exposes a gap only judicial oversight can close.
item.author: (ipvideomarket)

item.title: Unhandled exception - An error occurred trying to start process when using .NET CLI in VS Code snap on Ubuntu | no dogma blog
item.description: There is a an interesting bug when using the .NET CLI in VS Code snap installs.

item.title: Pledging Another $400,000 to the Zig Software Foundation
item.description: My family is pledging another $400,0001 to the Zig Software Foundation (ZSF). This brings our total pledged support for ZSF to $700,000, after our initial donation in 2024.

item.title: Never Give Them Your Face
item.description: They are not verifying your age. They are building a permanent identity checkpoint over public life. Here is why to refuse.
